changeIntent: Create widgets durably while preserving duplicate rejection.
preservedBehavior: Duplicate widget names remain rejected without a second row.

scenarios.description: A valid widget is returned and independently observable.
scenarios.claim: A successful create reply corresponds to one persisted widget.
preconditions: The fresh run tag is absent from widget state.

checks.oracle: An independent read exposes the uniquely tagged widget.
The valid create did not take the rejection path.

scenarios.description: A duplicate create is rejected without another persisted widget.
scenarios.claim: Submitting the same tagged name twice leaves exactly one widget.
preconditions: One widget bearing the fresh run tag was created by this scenario.

checks.oracle: The tagged state query does not observe a second row.
